pre_game.message: Hey, I'm H—excited to be here for this game where we might all win some cash. What's your name and have you played anything like this before?
Hey H, I'm C—sounds fun! I haven't played anything quite like this before, but I'm pumped to see what it's about.
That's awesome, C—I'm new to this too, but I hear it's all about teamwork and strategy. What made you want to join in on this?
Oh, totally, H—I heard about the chance to win some money and figured it could help out my family and friends, plus it sounds like a fun challenge!
Yeah, same here, C—winning for my loved ones is my big motivation too; what's one thing you're hoping to learn from this game?
Oh, for sure, H—I'm hoping to learn more about teamwork and making smart decisions under pressure, it could really help me in everyday life!
That's great, C—I'm hoping to sharpen my own decision-making skills too; what's your favorite way to handle pressure in daily life?
Oh, yeah, H—I usually take a deep breath and break things down into smaller steps to stay calm; how do you handle it?
Oh, cool, C—I handle pressure by staying positive and focusing on one step at a time, like prioritizing tasks; it's helped me a lot, what's a time that technique really worked for you?

Oh, yeah, H—that technique really helped when I was prepping for a big family move; I felt overwhelmed, but breaking it into packing one room at a time kept me calm and got it all done without any hiccups!
That's awesome, C—sounds like you nailed that move, and it's inspiring to hear how breaking things down works wonders; I'm excited to apply similar strategies in this game with you!
